metadata.title: Michael Anokam - Software Engineer
metadata.description: Software engineer focused on building fast, accessible, and scalable web applications with modern technologies.
metadata.author: Michael Anokam
metadata.ogDescription: Building fast, accessible, and scalable web applications with modern technologies.
metadata.twitterDescription: Building fast, accessible, and scalable web applications with modern technologies.

hero.description: Creative software engineer specializing in building innovative solutions that bridge technology and user experience. I craft clean, efficient code and transform ideas into impactful digital products.

about.paragraph1: I'm Michael Anokam, a software engineer passionate about creating innovative solutions that make a real impact. With expertise spanning full-stack development, I bring ideas to life through elegant code and thoughtful design.
about.paragraph2: My work focuses on building scalable applications, optimizing performance, and delivering seamless user experiences. I believe in writing code that's not just functional, but maintainable, efficient, and future-proof.

skills.description: A comprehensive toolkit refined over years of building production-grade applications at scale.

mediAxis.title: MediAxis
mediAxis.description: A hospital management system that streamlines patient records, appointments, billing, and staff workflows through a unified dashboard.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: My personal portfolio showcasing selected projects, design experiments, and interactive UI with smooth animations.

cleanSpark.title: CleanSpark
cleanSpark.description: A clean energy product website showcase promoting sustainable solar solutions for African homes and businesses.

blackfrica.title: Blackfrica
blackfrica.description: A culturally-driven NFT marketplace spotlighting African digital art and creators, featuring curated collections, seamless wallet integration, and immersive animated UI.

projectsPage.twitterDescription: All my projects in one place.

experience.description: A timeline of recent growth, challenges overcome, and milestones achieved across my career.

entries.description: Building an MVP for a decentralized fashion modeling ecosystem with landing pages, technical structure, and NFT royalty logic.
Enhanced UI and functionality across Grainlify with responsive design, dashboard layout, and dynamic ecosystem interactions.
Built and improved UI components and pages, focusing on responsive layouts, seamless interactions, and consistent user experience.
Added multi-network support with seamless Mainnet/Testnet switching, network-aware API calls, and type-safe state handling.
Built responsive Hero Section with animations and composed Commitment Marketplace page using existing components with page-level state.
Implemented a reusable UI component library with dark-mode support and scalable props-driven components for consistent design.
Designed and built the landing page UI with responsive sections and an optimized particle animation background with dynamic connections.
Built Carbnb, car rental system, in a hackathon team with structured roles (PM, UI/UX, backend/frontend) and collaborative workflows.

contact.description: Have a project in mind? I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, creative ideas, or just having a chat about technology and design.
contact.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.

Hire me and get free dance lessons (I'll break it down hehe) 💃

Hire me so I can become world president 🌍 and stop world hunger
Seriously... still reading my thoughts? Hire me already! 😅
